7.1.title: Privacy Act 1988 — Full text via legislation.gov.au
7.1.snippet: Australia's comprehensive data protection framework covering collection, use, disclosure, and storage of personal information. Full text of the Act including APPs.

7.1.title: Privacy Act 1988 — Full text via AustLII
7.1.snippet: Australia's Privacy Act 1988 as consolidated. Full text of the Act including APPs.

7.2.title: Cyber Security Act 2024 — via AustLII
7.2.snippet: Establishes the cybersecurity framework for Australia including incident reporting and information sharing.

7.3.title: OAIC — Notifiable Data Breaches scheme
7.3.snippet: Part IIIC of the Privacy Act requires notification of data breaches. Records of data breaches must be retained.

7.4.snippet: APP 1 requires entities to have a clearly expressed and up-to-date privacy policy.
